hierarchy-resolver.description: Resolve task paths to full directory paths with metadata

format-detector.description: Detect template version and compare against expected version

status-aggregator.description: Entry point for status aggregation (trampolines to version-specific script)

status-aggregator-v2.0.description: Status aggregation for v2.0 format (8-phase workflow)

status-aggregator-v2.1.description: Status aggregation for v2.1 format (10-phase workflow)

task-context-inference.description: Infer current task and workflow step from git/file context signals

task-stack.description: Manage task stack for context tracking (push/pop/peek/list/clear/size operations)

template-version-parser.description: Parse Template Version field from workflow files

workflow-control.description: Determine workflow continuation based on current step status

context-inheritance.description: Entry point for context inheritance (trampolines to version-specific script)

context-inheritance-v2.0.description: Context inheritance for v2.0 format (8-phase workflow)

context-inheritance-v2.1.description: Context inheritance for v2.1 format (10-phase workflow)

template-copier.description: Entry point for template copying (trampolines to version-specific script)

template-copier-v2.0.description: Template copying for v2.0 format (8-phase workflow)

template-copier-v2.1.description: Template copying for v2.1 format (10-phase workflow)

migrate-v1-to-v2.sh.description: Migrate v1.0 tasks to v2.0 hierarchical structure with git-first backup

validate-migration.sh.description: Validate migrated task integrity (Template Version, Migration field, structure)

rollback-migration.sh.description: Rollback migration to v1.0 using git tag or manual backup

migrate-v2.1-file-order.description: Migrate v2.1 tasks to corrected file order (e=testing-plan, f=implementation-exec)

CIG::MarkdownParser.description: Markdown parsing with structure awareness for status extraction

CIG::TaskPath.description: Task path normalization, validation, and resolution

CIG::WorkflowFiles.description: Workflow file operations, version detection, status mapping

CIG::Options.description: Simple command-line option parser with long/short option support

CIG::StatusAggregator::Core.description: Version-agnostic status aggregation algorithm (shared by v2.0 and v2.1)

CIG::TemplateCopier::Core.description: Version-agnostic template copying logic (shared by v2.0 and v2.1)

CIG::ContextInheritance::Core.description: Version-agnostic context inheritance logic (shared by v2.0 and v2.1)

CIG::WorkflowFiles::V20.description: Workflow file mappings for v2.0 format (8-phase workflow)

CIG::WorkflowFiles::V21.description: Workflow file mappings for v2.1 format (10-phase workflow)

TaskState.description: Task state measurements (retrospective: state_done, prospective: state_achievable)

TaskContextInference.description: Signal-based inference for current task and workflow step context
